untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking the 13-candlestick series low (breakout_price) which is not available as a standard indicator. The concept of 'breakout price is the low of the last candleline in the 13-candleseries' requires custom lookback window calculation beyond allowed indicators. Also, regime names 'BULL_MARKET' and 'BEAR_MARKET' are not in the allowed regime list (should be TRENDING_UP, TRENDING_DOWN, RANGING, HIGH_VOL, ANY).
translation_notes: Pattern-based reversal signals typically require custom series tracking. Attempted to express the core logic: price closes below a reference level (prev_low as proxy for breakout price) and confirmation on next bar. However, without explicit indicator for the 13-bar series low, this is incomplete. Recommend: (1) Create custom indicator for 13-bar rolling low, (2) Define what 'breakout price' means precisely, (3) Clarify if BULL_MARKET/BEAR_MARKET map to TRENDING_UP/TRENDING_DOWN.
